description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a new breast cancer research project, add 5 HER2-stained breast slides scanned in 2023 to it, and mark all added slides as high priority.
tasks.name: Create a new breast cancer research project, add 5 HER2-stained breast slides scanned in 2023 to it, and mark all added slides as high priority.
tasks.description: Create a new breast cancer research project, add 5 HER2-stained breast slides scanned in 2023 to it, and mark all added slides as high priority.

tasks.instruction: On a colon adenocarcinoma slide, run two available tumor segmentation algorithms, compare their tumor area measurements, and set as default whichever reports the larger tumor area.

target_names: Tumor Segmentation v1 result on CRC-2023-001_HE
Tumor Segmentation v2 result on CRC-2023-001_HE

tasks.name: On a colon adenocarcinoma slide, run two available tumor segmentation algorithms, compare their tumor area measurements, and set as default whichever reports the larger tumor area.
tasks.description: On a colon adenocarcinoma slide, run two available tumor segmentation algorithms, compare their tumor area measurements, and set as default whichever reports the larger tumor area.

tasks.instruction: From NSCLC cases stained for PD-L1, create a new slide collection containing the 3 slides with PD-L1 percentage of at least 10%, choosing those with the highest PD-L1 values.
tasks.name: From NSCLC cases stained for PD-L1, create a new slide collection containing the 3 slides with PD-L1 percentage of at least 10%, choosing those with the highest PD-L1 values.
tasks.description: From NSCLC cases stained for PD-L1, create a new slide collection containing the 3 slides with PD-L1 percentage of at least 10%, choosing those with the highest PD-L1 values.

tasks.instruction: On a colon adenocarcinoma slide, draw and label 4 tumor polygon regions of interest, each with area at least 1.0 mm², using sequential names to distinguish them.
tasks.name: On a colon adenocarcinoma slide, draw and label 4 tumor polygon regions of interest, each with area at least 1.0 mm², using sequential names to distinguish them.
tasks.description: On a colon adenocarcinoma slide, draw and label 4 tumor polygon regions of interest, each with area at least 1.0 mm², using sequential names to distinguish them.

tasks.instruction: On a breast cancer H&E slide, generate a TIL density heatmap, adjust the visualization so the maximum density on the color scale is 500 cells/mm², and save these settings as a reusable preset.

target_names: TIL Density Map result on BRE-2021-HE-021_A

tasks.name: On a breast cancer H&E slide, generate a TIL density heatmap, adjust the visualization so the maximum density on the color scale is 500 cells/mm², and save these settings as a reusable preset.

tasks.instruction: Create a lung cancer cohort limited to Stage III–IV cases on H&E-stained slides with tumor area greater than 100 mm².
tasks.name: Create a lung cancer cohort limited to Stage III–IV cases on H&E-stained slides with tumor area greater than 100 mm².
tasks.description: Create a lung cancer cohort limited to Stage III–IV cases on H&E-stained slides with tumor area greater than 100 mm².

tasks.instruction: Starting from the default nuclei detection algorithm settings, create a custom configuration with minimum nucleus size 20 µm² and intensity threshold 0.35, save it, and assign it as the active nuclei detection configuration for the breast cancer research project focused on HER2-stained slides from 2023.

target_names: Breast HER2 2023 – Nuclei Detection v2 custom config assignment

tasks.name: Starting from the default nuclei detection algorithm settings, create a custom configuration with minimum nucleus size 20 µm² and intensity threshold 0.35, save it, and assign it as the active nuclei detection configuration for the breast cancer research project focused on HER2-stained slides from 2023.
tasks.description: Starting from the default nuclei detection algorithm settings, create a custom configuration with minimum nucleus size 20 µm² and intensity threshold 0.35, save it, and assign it as the active nuclei detection configuration for the breast cancer research project focused on HER2-stained slides from 2023.

tasks.instruction: In the lung imaging study that includes both NSCLC and small cell lung cancer cases, find all slides with focus score below 0.6 and change their status so they are excluded from analysis.
tasks.name: In the lung imaging study that includes both NSCLC and small cell lung cancer cases, find all slides with focus score below 0.6 and change their status so they are excluded from analysis.
tasks.description: In the lung imaging study that includes both NSCLC and small cell lung cancer cases, find all slides with focus score below 0.6 and change their status so they are excluded from analysis.

tasks.instruction: Within the breast cancer research project that aggregates HER2-stained slides scanned in 2023, open the metrics table, filter to slides analyzed with the newer tumor segmentation algorithm version, keep only the columns for case identifier, tumor area, and nuclei count, and export the resulting table as a CSV file.

target_names: Tumor Segmentation v2 result on BRE-2023-HER2-001_A
